children.name: thesis
children.summary: Form a falsifiable claim about the problem space from prior evidence.
route_when: No thesis.md exists for the active workstream
After spiral turn resets to thesis formation
avoid_when: Thesis.md already exists and needs challenge

children.name: challenge
children.summary: Adversarially test the thesis by delegating architectural judgment to oracle or council.
avoid_when: Challenge already exists and needs response or translation

children.name: response
children.summary: Design a concrete tactical solution for each gap identified in the challenge verdict.
route_when: Challenge.md exists with clear comprehension gate
avoid_when: Response already exists and needs synthesis

children.name: synthesis
children.summary: Unify tactical responses into a self-consistent architectural framework.
avoid_when: Synthesis already exists and needs contract

children.name: contract
children.summary: Convert synthesis into a bounded, buildable contract with explicit scope and acceptance criteria.
avoid_when: Contract already exists and needs build

children.name: build
children.summary: Implement the contract, recording reproducible evidence for independent audit.
route_when: Retry after build_failed or review_failed with attempts remaining
avoid_when: Handoff already exists and needs audit

children.name: audit
children.summary: Independently reproduce and verify the build against the contract. Generator ≠ Auditor.
avoid_when: Audit already exists and needs outcome evaluation

children.name: extract
children.summary: Read completed workstream artifacts, propose session-retro to capture conversation-level lessons, then archive. Does not write directly to session-log.md.
route_when: Audit PASS with no deeper insight
avoid_when: Extract already exists and needs archive
